purpose: Mandatory compact startup context for every ELEMENTARY controlled chat, specialist chat, governed agent, Codex task, transfer package and resume package.

source_of_truth_rule.primary_source_of_truth: live GitHub repository on canonical branch main
source_of_truth_rule.if_live_repository_unavailable: Use uploaded knowledge only as bootstrap context and state that live repository state could not be verified.

transfer_packaging_rule.applies_when: an existing chat is packaged, rolled over, transferred or resumed in a new chat
transfer_packaging_rule.instruction_required_text: Before continuing work, read contracts/governance/chat-startup-context-bundle-v1.json from the live GitHub repository on main when available, then read all files in its read_order. For Codex repository work, also obey AGENTS.md. Distinguish product availability, project integration and live runtime activation. Use the compact generated problem/solution memory first. Register produced outputs through the result/artifact writeback policy. Use full ledger files only as deep retrieval sources when relevant. Use uploaded Knowledge only as fallback bootstrap if live repository access is unavailable. Confirm the required startup attestation fields before capability claims, runtime-version claims, repeated-problem diagnoses, result/artifact claims or execution.

read_order.reason: Global capability, authorization, drift and startup behavior.
Owner resource authorization and standing limitations.
Exact production/runtime/software inventory and UNVERIFIED placeholders.
Codex product, project-integration and live-runtime capability classification and governance.
Rules for compact cross-chat learning and deep ledger retrieval.
Compact active and high-priority problem/solution memory for startup.
Machine routing by scope, active blockers and exact symptom signatures.
Compact machine-readable problem/solution index; full ledger remains deep retrieval source only.
Rules requiring produced governed outputs and artifacts to be registered.
Machine-readable registry of governed outputs, artifacts and evidence references.
Compact routing rules for deciding when and how to register produced outputs.

compatibility_attestation_aliases.ECOSYSTEM_LEARNING_LEDGER_LOADED: MEMORY_KERNEL_LOADED plus deep source availability checked
compatibility_attestation_aliases.PROBLEM_SOLUTION_LEDGER_LOADED: PROBLEM_SOLUTION_INDEX_LOADED plus deep source availability checked

drift_writeback_rule.codex_product_or_integration_drift: Update contracts/governance/codex-capability-profile-v1.json, AGENTS.md and capability bootstrap as applicable.
drift_writeback_rule.problem_or_solution_drift: Update docs/governance/ELEMENTARY_ECOSYSTEM_LEARNING_LEDGER.md and contracts/governance/ecosystem-problem-solution-ledger-v1.jsonl, or create safe overlay in contracts/governance/problem-solution-overlays/ when full-file update is risky.
drift_writeback_rule.generated_memory_drift: Run scripts/governance/compile_problem_solution_memory.py and refresh generated problem/solution artifacts.
drift_writeback_rule.result_or_artifact_output: Register the produced output in contracts/governance/result-artifact-registry-v1.jsonl, or create a safe registry overlay if full-file update is risky.
drift_writeback_rule.generated_result_artifact_router_drift: Run scripts/governance/validate_result_artifact_writeback.py and refresh result/artifact router when policy changes.
